title: 19 lines, base configuration
description: Satisfies the hypotheses of the Bartholdi–Blanc–Loisel iterative construction for the infinite series n = 18·2<sup>t</sup>+1.

title: 37 lines, one-step from 19
description: First iterative step applied to the 19-line base configuration using the Bartholdi–Blanc–Loisel construction.

title: 41 lines, one-step from 21
description: Single iterative step from a 21-line arrangement using the Forge–Ramírez Alfonsín construction. No infinite series is possible from the parent.

title: 45 lines, one-step from 23
description: Single iterative step from a 23-line arrangement using the Forge–Ramírez Alfonsín construction. No infinite series is possible from the parent.

title: 25 lines, pentagonal defect
description: An arrangement of 25 straight lines with a pentagonal defect (190 affine triangles, upper bound 191). Adding the line at infinity gives 26 projective lines attaining the projective upper bound (n(n−1)−5)/3 = 215. No infinite series is possible from the parent.

title: 49 lines, one-step from 25, pentagonal defect
description: One iterative step from the 25-line pentagonal-defect arrangement using the Forge–Ramírez Alfonsín construction. Adding the line at infinity gives 50 projective lines attaining the projective upper bound (n(n−1)−5)/3 = 815. No infinite series is possible from the parent.

title: 38 lines, one line added to 37
description: Obtained by adding one line to the 37-line configuration. Does not attain the upper bound but provides a lower bound for n = 38.

title: 42 lines, one line added to 41
description: Obtained by adding one line to the 41-line configuration. Does not attain the upper bound but provides a lower bound for n = 42.

title: 46 lines, one line added to 45
description: Obtained by adding one line to the 45-line configuration. Does not attain the upper bound but provides a lower bound for n = 46.
